records.output_text: So how do you get started with ? The first thing I want to learn from "Literature" and what works for me today? My goal here is to find out if any new material has been published at all or whether those have already existed . It will be very helpful because once we can gain an understanding of our ideas then there's no reason why things aren`t being considered more critically than just one project - which should help us become better educated on something else instead :)
